message:
feat(parser,layout): implement pie chart parsing and layout algorithm variant

Parser layer:
- Enhance parse_pie() to properly extract chart metadata: title
  directive, showData flag (both inline and standalone), and slice
  definitions with numeric values
- Build IrPieSlice vector and populate IrPieMeta with collected data
- Add set_pie_meta() method to IrBuilder to store pie metadata in IR

Layout layer:
- Add Pie variant to LayoutAlgorithm enum with corresponding
  as_str() mapping

This completes the pie chart data pipeline from Mermaid syntax through
IR, building on the IR structures and SVG rendering added in the
previous commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
